results.live_executive_summary: BSA (now legally 'Scouting America' as of February 2025) resolved the largest youth-organization sexual abuse case in US history via a $2.46B bankruptcy settlement covering 82,000+ claimants, finalized when the Supreme Court declined review in January 2026. All stored verdict tags remain accurate; the previously noted '$850M' figure was the insurer contribution sub-component, not the total — the full settlement is $2.46B. Roger A. Krone (President & Chief Executive Officer (Chief Scout Executive
